modern_reader_context.market_surface_rule: Use social discovery, school/work pressure, gaming, creator culture, comic shop/community, and phone-native life without sounding like an ad for platforms.
modern_reader_context.audience_story_rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture.
modern_reader_context.genre_relevance_rule: Modern romance must use mediated intimacy: unread messages, shared playlists, transit timing, boundaries, and public/private self-management.

catalyst.logline: A playlist meant for nobody syncs to the wrong phone, exposing a tenderness the protagonist has not said out loud.

modern_reader_context.craft_directive: Fuse the genre engine with a contemporary reader-world entrypoint. Market=en_US; audience=gen_z. Use catalyst 'shared_playlist_mistake': A playlist meant for nobody syncs to the wrong phone, exposing a tenderness the protagonist has not said out loud. Transmutation: Accidental sync becomes almost-confession. Market surface: Use social discovery, school/work pressure, gaming, creator culture, comic shop/community, and phone-native life without sounding like an ad for platforms. Audience rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture. Use concrete objects and social pressure on page one; do not name-drop trends.
